title: Add ability to batch functions on containers
body:
Fixes #173 

Add ability to run multiple operations on the same container under a single lock and syncContainer() for performance reasons.

comments.body: Overall LGTM, I like the approach.    One small possible change and a nit.
LGTM, but when do you see a batch command being executed?

@baude originally requested it for use in `podman ps` to solve performance problems we were seeing - we needed to take the lock and sync multiple times to get everything ps needed

I also anticipate we'll need it in CRI-O, most CRI container endpoints will probably end up being batched ops

:pushpin: Commit 90406e4 has been approved by `rhatdan`
